channel.title: Bookkeeping on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Bookkeeping on yexca'Blog

item.title: From Saving Money, To Living Life, To Saying Goodbye
item.description: This article was partially machine translated I started Bookkeeping in April 2023. I stopped in April 2025. My last entry: ¥0 The Beginning: To Save Money and Gain Control It all started very simply — I wanted to control my spending and build better financial awareness. And in the beginning, it really worked. I successfully curbed some of my bad spending habits. The Process: Stepping Into the World of Optimization and Card Collecting Gradually, in pursuit of “better” …
